en.extract:
The Guadalcanal thrush (Zoothera turipavae) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''Guadalcanal thrush''' ('''''Zoothera turipavae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Turdidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to the [[Solomon Islands]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref name="iucn status 12 November 2021" />
